exemplar.title: Comparing the cooling of a PS5 compared to an Xbox Series X?

detailedExemplarData.title: Comparing the cooling of a PS5 compared to an Xbox Series X?

subject.title: Mathematics Analysis and Approaches (AA)
subject.description:
**IB Mathematics Analysis and Approaches** is a **Group 5** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **number and algebra, functions, geometry and trigonometry, statistics and probability, and calculus**, with a strong focus on **theoretical understanding, formal mathematical reasoning, and analytical problem-solving**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | Non-calculator written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 2** | Calculator allowed written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 3** | Calculator allowed problem-solving | N/A | 60 minutes | 20% (HL only) |
| **Mathematical Exploration** | Internal Assessment | 20 hours | 20 hours | 20% |

strengths: Exploration follows a clear logical progression with wellâsignposted sections (Introduction, Methodology, Results, Calculus, Conclusion).
Headings and transitional sentences guide the reader through data collection, modelling, calculus and final discussion.
Tables and figures are grouped near their discussion, and the conclusion ties back to the research question.
weaknesses: Repetition in wording (e.g. opening paragraph) and minor digressions reduce conciseness.
Absence of page numbers and inconsistent citation formatting hinder easy navigation.
Some figures (PS5 interior) are not referenced in text; table headers are inconsistently styled.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Strand assessments place coherence and organization solidly in band 3, while conciseness is band 2. Overall the report is well organized and mostly relevant but not yet âexceptionallyâ polished, so a score of 3/4 accurately reflects its presentation quality.

strengths: Mathematical notation (logs, derivatives, integrals) is used consistently and variables are generally defined.
Multiple representations (data tables, scatter plots with regression, derivative curves, calculator screenshots) support the argument.
Key results are communicated clearly despite some minor slips.
weaknesses: Several axes lack units and one graph is missing a legend.
Integration work omits differentials and skips algebraic steps, making some derivations hard to follow.
Inconsistent notation (f vs g), missing units on numerical results, and imprecise terminology (e.g. âThermodynamicsâ) occur.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Language and notation earn band 3, representations band 3, but logical clarity is only band 2 due to skipped steps and minor notational errors. A holistic score of 3/4 reflects strong but not flawless mathematical communication.

strengths: Designing and executing a handsâon experiment shows significant independent thinking.
The firstâperson narrative and gamerâs perspective demonstrate a clear personal approach.
Innovative use of console dismantling and calculus metrics indicates good creativity and initiative.
weaknesses: Mathematical methods mostly mirror classroom techniques rather than breaking new ground.
Personal approach, while genuine, lacks exceptional innovation.
Further novelty in modelling choices could have raised the engagement level.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: All three strands sit in the mid-level band (significant thinking, clear personal approach, good creativity). The work goes beyond routine but does not reach the outstanding descriptor, so 2/3 is appropriate.

strengths: Reflection on data omission after one hour is meaningful and appears throughout the report.
Limitations (number of trials, sensor placement) are thoughtfully acknowledged.
Suggestions for future improvements show engagement with the experimental process.
weaknesses: Critical analysis remains at a descriptive level; deeper probing of model validity is lacking.
Evaluation of outcomes is limited, with few implications or theoretical comparisons.
No quantitative discussion of uncertainty or direct comparison with Newtonâs Law parameters.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Depth of reflection reaches band 2, but critical analysis and evaluation of outcomes are band 1. Overall, the reflection transcends token remarks but falls short of substantial critical evaluation, warranting a 2/3.

strengths: Use of logarithmic regression, differentiation and definite integration directly addresses the research question.
Mathematics employed is commensurate with SL syllabus level (logarithmic functions, RÂ² interpretation, basic calculus).
Interpretation of RÂ² demonstrates understanding of model reliability.
weaknesses: Notation errors (missing differentials, unclear integral expressions) and typos in substitution steps occur.
Algebraic simplifications omit chainârule factors; limits or constants of integration are not always specified.
Justification for sampling intervals and physical interpretation of integrals is underdeveloped.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Relevant SL-level mathematics is used appropriately (band 3), level appropriateness is band 3, but errors and omissions in understanding pull the third strand to band 2. A holistic mark of 3/6 reflects solid but error-prone use of mathematics.

strandSelections.reasoning: While the argument is broadly understandable, several algebraic steps are skipped and the discussion of why a logarithmic model is appropriate is thin.  Misplaced brackets in one integration line add confusion.  These issues mean the logical structure is only âsomeâ rather than âgoodâ.

The student shows some understanding of differentiation and integration, yet several inaccuracies remain: misuse of substitution notation, mis-transcribed coefficients, and treating the integral as a cumulative âcooling effectâ without physical justification.  Because errors affect validity but the core ideas are identifiable, the strand fits âsome understanding with errorsâ.

The student provides tables of raw data, scatter plots with regression curves, derivative curves, and calculator screen-shots.  These representations complement each other and help the reader see the mathematical reasoning.  However, some axes lack units and one derivative graph omits a legend, so the work falls short of âhighly effectiveâ.

The investigation follows a recognisable line of argument: introduction â data collection â modelling â calculus â conclusion.  Headings and transitional sentences usually make it clear why one step follows the next, so the reader can follow the reasoning without difficulty.  Minor lapses occur (e.g. sudden jump from integration set-up to final numerical answer) but these do not disrupt the overall flow.  Consequently the work is judged coherent and logically developed rather than âexcellentâ.

Collecting internal temperatures by dismantling consoles and using calculus to create two comparative metrics illustrates creativity and initiative beyond a routine textbook exercise.  However, modelling and analysis remain relatively standard, so the strand fits the âgoodâ rather than âexceptionalâ descriptor.

Analysis of results is largely descriptive (e.g. âXbox cooled more consistentlyâ).  There is little probing of why the logarithmic parameters differ, no comparison with Newtonâs Law of Cooling, and no quantitative discussion of experimental uncertainty.  This shows only a basic level of critical analysis.

Outcomes are stated (Xbox better average, PS5 faster initial rate) and a single improvement (more trials) is suggested, but there is no deeper evaluation of model validity or implications for console design.  The work therefore meets only the âlimited evaluation of outcomesâ descriptor.

The student reflects on why data after one hour were omitted and recognises limitations such as only two trials and shallow sensor placement.  These comments go beyond a token mention and appear throughout the report, satisfying âmeaningful reflectionâ.

Mathematical symbols ( ln,  â,  Â°C, derivatives, integrals) are employed consistently and variables are generally defined.  Occasional slips occur (missing differential in one integral, wrong prime notation in text) but do not obscure meaning.  Hence the use of language and notation is âmostly consistentâ rather than flawless.

The student frames the study from a personal gamerâs viewpoint and tailors the data collection to equipment available at home, demonstrating a clear personal approach.  The approach is genuine but not especially innovative, so a mid-level band is appropriate.

Most of the writing is relevant to comparing cooling performance, but there is noticeable repetition (e.g. repeated statements about calculus improving gaming experience) and digressions on personal preference that do not advance the mathematics.  At 16 pages the text could be trimmed without loss of substance, so the work is âmostly relevant with some unnecessary elementsâ.

Logarithmic regression, differentiation and definite integration are all relevant to modelling cooling curves and lie squarely within the AA SL syllabus.  Their application addresses the research question directly.  Some steps are mechanical, so the use is âappropriateâ rather than âcomprehensiveâ.

Designing and carrying out a hands-on cooling experiment, choosing logarithmic models, and deciding to truncate data after 60 min all show significant independent thinking, but the mathematics largely mirrors classroom techniques.  The evidence is therefore âsignificantâ rather than âoutstandingâ.

Sections are clearly sign-posted (Introduction, Methodology, Results, Graphs, Calculus, Conclusion).  Tables and figures are grouped logically next to the discussion that refers to them.  A short concluding paragraph closes the loop with the research question.  The structure is therefore âwell organised with clear structureâ, although the absence of page numbers and an erratic citation list prevents it from reaching the âexceptionally well organisedâ descriptor.

The mathematics is broadly at the correct level: logarithmic functions, RÂ² interpretation, basic calculus.  It neither dips below SL level nor introduces techniques beyond SL.  Hence it is âcommensurate with course levelâ, but not developed enough to merit full-mark bands.

annotations.comment: The cooling graph lacks axis labels and unit markings. Always include clear labels on both axes for reader orientation.
The interpretation of RÂ² = 0.962 is well explained and shows an understanding of model reliability.
When presenting the Xbox regression, discuss how its parameters (a,b,c,d) compare to the PS5 model for deeper insight.
The text does not comment on the physical meaning of the parameter d in the logarithmic model. What does this constant represent in your context?
The notation âf(x)=â«Câ is not meaningful here; clarify the integral expression with a proper integrand and differential.
The generic â«ln x dx formula is stated but missing its differential. Always include dx to maintain rigorous notation.
The title is concise, descriptive and immediately communicates the focus of the investigation.
There are no page numbers throughout the report, making it difficult to reference specific sections. Consider adding page numbers in the footer.
The opening paragraph repeats the phrase âthe performance of each console...â twice. Trim redundant wording for greater conciseness.
The research aim is described informally. State a clear research question, e.g. âHow do the cooling rates of PS5 and Xbox Series X compare under identical conditions?â
The studentâs first-person voice and genuine interest in gaming demonstrate a strong personal engagement with the topic.
The methodology description lacks justification for chosen time intervals. Explain why specific sampling times were selected mathematically or experimentally.
Connecting your classroom curiosity in calculus to this practical experiment shows genuine initiative and independent thinking.
Consider adding a simple schematic of the console interior showing thermometer placement to clarify the experimental setup visually.
The figure of the PS5 interior is not explicitly referenced or discussed in the text. Always label and refer to figures to guide the reader.
The raw data table is well structured and presents all trials clearly, facilitating further analysis.
Some column headers lack units (e.g. âAverageâ needs âÂ°Câ). Ensure every data heading includes its unit for mathematical clarity.
Table 2âs header formatting (âTry 1/ Â°Câ) differs from Table 1. Standardize table styles to improve presentation coherence.
Consider rounding all averages to one decimal place for consistency across data tables.
Referring to Newtonâs Law as âThermodynamicsâ is imprecise. Use the correct term âNewtonâs Law of Coolingâ to align with scientific convention.
It would strengthen the methodology to describe quantitatively how outliers would trigger a repeat trial, perhaps by specifying an allowable variance threshold.
Define explicitly u, du, and dx in the substitution step before integrating by parts to improve clarity.
The substitution code contains typos (e.g. âdxtâ) and mixes variables. Rewrite the u-substitution clearly in mathematical form.
Several algebraic steps in the integration by parts derivation are skipped, making the logic hard to follow. Show intermediate steps.
When presenting the final integral, specify the limits or constant of integration before evaluation.
The result â2531.7â is given without units. It should be specified as Â°CÂ·min before dividing by 60.
Including the calculator screenshot provides concrete evidence of your numerical evaluation process.
After interpreting the integrals, compare results with Newtonâs theoretical prediction for validation.
The derivative gâ²(x) omits the chain-rule multiplication in its algebraic simplification. Recalculate to confirm.
The formula for fâ²(x) is presented but the function name âfâ vs âgâ is inconsistent across pages; standardize notation.
Report the units (Â°C per minute) when quoting the derivative results at x=0 to give physical meaning.
The concluding sentence on this page is cut off mid-thought. Complete your evaluation to maintain coherence.
The reflection on long gaming sessions is interesting but isnât linked back to mathematical findings. Tie it to your calculus results.
Your final decision to prefer Xbox reveals clear personal engagement; this outcome ties your data interpretation to real-world choice.
Mentioning âdemosâ is unclear. Clarify what demo tools or software you used to program your integrations.
Reflect on how deeper sensor placement issues affected data validity and propose a method to quantify that uncertainty.
Only one source is cited, limiting depth. Incorporate additional references on Newtonâs Law of Cooling and regression methodology.
The citation header is formatted differently from the body text; adopt a consistent citation style (APA, MLA) throughout.
